name: actron-air-esphome-card
description: Custom Lovelace card for Actron Air ESPHome Keypad
author: John Ferlito

scripts.build: pnpm run lint:biome && pnpm run lint:types && pnpm lint:knip && vite build
scripts.remote: vite build && ssh root@homeassistant.local 'rm -rf /config/custom_components/actron_air_esphome' && scp -r custom_components/* root@homeassistant.local:/config/custom_components/actron_air_esphome && scp dist/assets/index*.js root@homeassistant.local:/config/custom_components/actron_air_esphome/frontend/actron-air-esphome-card.js
